mapper.select:
/* selectRcvdcky */
select fn_wm_rcvdcky() as rcvdcky from dual

/* selectEoasnky */
select fn_wm_eoasnky() as eoasnky from dual

/* selectWmr40List */
select PI.COMPKEY, PI.WAREKEY, PI.OWNERKY, PI.SKUMKEY, PI.VHPLNKY, PI.VHPLNIT, (SELECT SKUDESC FROM MSKUWC WHERE COMPKEY = PI.COMPKEY AND WAREKEY = PI.WAREKEY AND OWNERKY = PI.OWNERKY AND SKUMKEY = PI.SKUMKEY) as SKUDESC, PI.TRITQTY, fn_com_todate(PI.LMODATE) as lmodate, fn_com_totime(PI.LMOTIME) as lmotime, fn_sy_usernam(PI.COMPKEY, PI.LMOUSER) as LMOUSER, OC.SALMEMO as salmemo from TPLNIT PI inner join OCOSAL OC ON OC.COMPKEY = PI.COMPKEY AND OC.COOUTKY = PI.COOUTKY AND OC.COOUTIT = PI.COOUTIT where PI.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and PI.WAREKEY = #{warekey} and PI.RETODYN = 'Y' and PI.SHTRSTS = 'UNLOADING' and PI.RETINYN = 'N' and PI.OWNERKY = #{ownerky}
mapper.insert:
/* saveStoreReturnToOcopur */
insert into OCOPUR ( COMPKEY, COPODKY, COPODIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, PURSTAT, PURDATE, PURTIME, VENDKEY, OWNERKY, SKUSKEY, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, RCHSQTY, POITQTY, RCVWHKY, REQDATE, REQTIME, COOUTIT, VNDCFYN, VNDCFDT, VNDCFTM, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) values ( #{compkey}, #{copodky}, #{copodit}, #{doccate}, #{doctype}, #{purstat}, to_char(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(NOW(), 'hh24miss'), #{vendkey}, #{ownerky}, #{skumkey}, #{skumkey}, (SELECT SKUDESC FROM MSKUWC WHERE WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND OWNERKY = #{ownerky} AND SKUMKEY = #{skumkey}), #{rcveqty}, #{rcveqty}, #{warekey}, to_char(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(NOW(), 'hh24miss'), 0, 'Y', to_char(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(NOW(), 'hh24miss'), to_char(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(NOW(), 'hh24miss'), #{userData.useract}, to_char(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(NOW(), 'hh24miss'), #{userData.useract} )
mapper.select: /* selectPakblky */ select fn_wm_paklbky() from dual

/* selectTaskoky */
select fn_wm_taskoky() as taskoky from dual

/* selectTaskoit */
select fn_wm_taskoit(#{compkey}, #{taskoky}) as taskoit from dual

CALL sp_wm_ctrwrcvitcancel( #{userData.compkey}, #{warekey}, #{rcvdcky}, #{rcvdcit}, #{rcarscd}, #{rcarsnm}, #{userData.useract} , #{omsgkey, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oresult, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER} )
